# sevalla_pipeline_stage_application (Resource)

Attaches an application to a pipeline stage in Sevalla.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sevalla_pipeline_stage_application" "example" {
  pipeline_id    = sevalla_pipeline.example.id
  stage_id       = sevalla_pipeline_stage.staging.id
  application_id = sevalla_application.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) The ID of the application to attach to the stage.
- `pipeline_id` (String) The ID of the pipeline.
- `stage_id` (String) The ID of the pipeline stage.
